title: Broadway Melody of 1938
writer: Jack McGowan, Sid Silvers, Harry W. Conn
actors: Robert Taylor, Eleanor Powell, George Murphy
plot: Steve Raleigh wants to produce a show on Broadway. He finds a backer, Herman Whipple and a leading lady, Sally Lee, however his wife Caroline Whipple forces Steve to use a known star, not a newcomer. Sally purchases a horse she us...
